text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: So this is a Japanese racecourse... Not bad at all.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Far-east nation of Japan... Do you truly harbor the opponent I seek?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
...Had my timing been even slightly off, it would have been you who
crossed the finish line first.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
This truly was a narrow victory... I've never had a race that left my
heart pounding like this before.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
Only the strong could do this to me. El Condor Pasa, you are truly
worthy of the title champion.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, coming to Japan will make your heart pound even
harder.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Japan?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get this strong on my own. It was thanks to my friends—my
rivals in Japan—that I got to this point.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I'm worthy of the champion title, that means we've got lots more
champions in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
I can still vividly recall how my heart soared hearing those words.
Even now, they make every cell in my body quake in anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: ...Be sure to entertain me, Umamusume of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day we've all been waiting for! Acclaimed Umamusume
the world over have gathered here for the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And we have quite the lineup this year! We have a total of four Derby
Umamusume, including the winner of the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But the name on everyone's lips is the winner of the Prix de l'Arc de
Triomphe—the one who defeated El Condor Pasa—Montjeu!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just how will the racers of Japan face her?! And who among these
racers will be declared the world's strongest?!

text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text: I can't believe Grass Wonder had to pull out...

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text:
With Grass Wonder, I was sure Japan had a chance, but I'm not so
sure now.

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text:
These overseas racers are on a whole nother level... And that's not
even considering Montjeu.

text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text: Even so, I bet you're still rooting for Japan, right?

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: Of course I am, but I also want to be realistic...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I see you're a little nervous after all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, more like super nervous...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of the Japanese racers, you're the one people have the highest
expectations for right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Conversely, you could say you show the most potential of all the
Japanese racers. You should be proud.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right, you did everything you could to prepare! You even got
down to your ideal weight! Way to go, Spe! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-why do you know about my weight?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And what's more, you'll have a reassuring ally watching over you soon
enough.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Who could that—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Perfect timing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Good... Looks like I made it in time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh... Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka's here?! Wait, why would—America! You were in America!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I wouldn't dare watch such an important race on TV.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Woooow! It's Suzuka! She's here! She's really here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since Team Sirius was all together, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Well, this is a big race! We need the whole team here!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Our cheers will be the loudest in the stands!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe, I've heard a lot about today's racers while overseas.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I want you to show them all how much you shine. I
believe that is our greatest wish as your teammates.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My teammates' wish...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You better give us a dream performance today.
choice_data_list:
Now get out there and give this race everything
you've got!

Now get out there and give this race everything
you've got!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You better give us a dream performance today.
choice_data_list:
Now get out there and give this race everything
you've got!

Now get out there and give this race everything
you've got!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, Sei! Everybody!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're here to cheer you on, Special Week. I'm happy to see you look
calm and collected.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well yeah, she's not you, you know.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pardon?! Are you implying I get nervous?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, thanks for coming, King, Sei.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
They always call Japanese racers weak, but don't let them get in your
head. If you run like you always do, I'm sure you'll do fine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is injured... and I've decided to take a different path, so we
won't be running today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You know what that means, Spe. You gotta work hard for all of us!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and finally the Kikuka Sho...
Run like you did against us in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll run fast enough for both of you.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Spe, I've always admired you, and I think that's what helped me run
with the energy I have now!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
So you better show 'em all! Show 'em the run I saw at the autumn
Tenno Sho—the one you can't help but try to chase!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Your running form is also forever carved into my heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
At the spring Tenno Sho... your performance left me wanting more... I
wanted to follow after you—to someday surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I hope you will allow me to race you again. I would like
very much to win against a world champion.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Don't worry, Tsuru, Bright! I'll give a race performance that'll
get your competitive fire burning!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sounds like you're more than ready for this, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, my faith in you feels much more secure than usual.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El! Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I would prefer to pay back Montjeu myself, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You'll have to do it for me, Spe! Don't you dare lose!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I believe in you, Spe. I know you can win.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And once you do, I'll be waiting for you... at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I swear I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: At last, the racers for today's Japan Cup are stepping onto the turf.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The most popular of the Japanese racers is Special Week! Just look at
how the Ruler of Japan shines!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Speee!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Speee! Fight oooon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Something wrong, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, I simply was reminded of something when I saw Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I swear that when we watched Rice, Ticket, Brian, and even Suzuka
head for their races, they shined just as gallantly as she does now.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Watching you was the same way, you know. You were practically
glowing with the desire to fulfill your dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fulfill my dream... Nothing ever changes, does it? You're always
thinking of us, and we never want to disappoint you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The members of Team Sirius all ran to achieve their dreams... Let's see
you do the same, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: We finally meet, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, it's nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa... Your friend gave me a race that I could never
forget.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
Running against her brought just as much joy as winning the Arc. It
truly changed my perception of Japan's racers.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
I want to feel that joy—that rush—once again. That desire is what
brought me here today.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Therefore, I hope your performance today will grant that wish...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I never thought you'd have such high hopes for me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me. I'll grant your wish by becoming the best racer in
Japan, here and now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: May the best racer win, Montjeu!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: <May the best racer win, Special Week.>
